validated_commands.format: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && .venv/bin/ruff format src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_check: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ && .venv/bin/ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.notes: Use python3.12 -m uv (PyPy3.10 uv module not available). No --no-build-isolation needed with Python 3.12. rpds-py builds fine. Baseline: ~6388 passed, 11 pre-existing failures (ANSI-strip policy status + llm runtime unavailable). Use .venv/bin/ruff not uv run ruff.

coverage_baseline.notes: test_targets_phase.py: 16 tests (was 13, added 3 for explicit target dir creation).

ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic, bold) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]' to strip before text assertions.

testing_backlog.notes: Large complex file ~2804 lines. Core install logic. High risk. Deferred.

completed_work.description: Task3: Fix logic-replay anti-pattern in TestExplicitTargetDirCreation (#768). 3 new phase-level tests in test_targets_phase.py. Task5: Commented on #768. Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.
Task3: +7 tests for view command error paths. Task7: new 2026-05 monthly issue created.
Task4: verified PR #1059 and #1029 CI passing. Task7: closed 2026-04 issue #1060, created 2026-05 issue #1087.
Task3: 21 new tests for uninstall/engine.py helpers. Task4: verified #1029 CI passing.
Fixed 7 pre-existing failures in test_policy_status.py. 6675 tests pass.
